zh.lifeSummary: Jean de Valois是Louis de Valois I, duc d'Orléans, Duke of Orléans和Yolande Mariette D'Enghien的兒子，於1402年11月23日出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲。他於1439年10月26日與Marie d’Harcourt在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1468年11月24日在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-德-馬內利哈y勒-洛斯利哈y勒-洛斯享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Jean de Valois是Louis de Valois I, duc d'Orléans, Duke of Orléans和Yolande Mariette D'Enghien的儿子，于1402年11月23日出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲。他于1439年10月26日与Marie d’Harcourt在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1468年11月24日在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-德-馬內利哈y勒-洛斯利哈y勒-洛斯享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Valois
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre, Henri, Normand, Alcide, Armand, Emilien, Gilberte, Gilles, Herve, Jacques, Lucien.
habitational name from (Le) Valois, the name of a few places in France, e.g. in Forez and Limousin.

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: Jean de Valois was born on 23 November 1402, in Paris, Île-de-France, France as the son of Louis de Valois I, duc d'Orléans, Duke of Orléans and Yolande Mariette D'Enghien. He married Marie d’Harcourt on 26 October 1439, in Paris, Île-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 24 November 1468, in L'Haÿ-les-Roses, L'Haÿ-les-Roses, Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Jean de Valois est né le 23 novembre 1402, à Paris, Île-de-France, France, fils de Louis de Valois I, duc d'Orléans, Duke of Orléans et Yolande Mariette D'Enghien. Il a épousé Marie d’Harcourt le 26 octobre 1439, à Paris, Île-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 24 novembre 1468, à L'Haÿ-les-Roses, L'Haÿ-les-Roses, Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Jean de Valois wurde am 23. November 1402 in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich, als Sohn von Louis de Valois I, duc d'Orléans, Duke of Orléans und Yolande Mariette D'Enghien geboren. Er hat am 26. Oktober 1439 in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich Marie d’Harcourt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 24. November 1468 im Alter von 66 Jahren in L'Haÿ-les-Roses, L'Haÿ-les-Roses, Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Jean de Valois è nato il il 23 novembre 1402 nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia come figlio di Louis de Valois I, duc d'Orléans, Duke of Orléans e Yolande Mariette D'Enghien. Lui sposato Marie d’Harcourt il 26 ottobre 1439, nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 24 novembre 1468, nel L'Haÿ-les-Roses, L'Haÿ-les-Roses, Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean de Valoisは1402年11月23日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスでLouis de Valois I, duc d'Orléans, Duke of OrléansとYolande Mariette D'Enghienの息子として生まれた。1439年10月26日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスでMarie d’Harcourtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1468年11月24日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスヴァル-デ-マルンル'ハy-レス-ローセスル'ハy-レス-ローセスで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean de Valois(은)는 1402년 11월 23일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 Louis de Valois I, duc d'Orléans, Duke of Orléans(와)과 Yolande Mariette D'Enghien의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1439년 10월 26일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 Marie d’Harcourt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1468년 11월 24일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 발-데-마니 '하y-레스-로즈스 '하y-레스-로즈스에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.23 November 1402–24 November 1468: 23 de novembro de 1402–24 de novembro de 1468
pt.lifeSummary: Jean de Valois nasceu em 23 de novembro de 1402, em Paris, Île-de-France, França filho de Louis de Valois I, duc d'Orléans, Duke of Orléans e Yolande Mariette D'Enghien. Ele casou-se com Marie d’Harcourt em 26 de outubro de 1439, em Paris, Île-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de novembro de 1468, em L'Haÿ-les-Roses, L'Haÿ-les-Roses, Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, França, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Jean de Valois родился 23 ноября 1402 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция. Его родителей звали Louis de Valois I, duc d'Orléans, Duke of Orléans и Yolande Mariette D'Enghien. Он женился на женщине по имени Marie d’Harcourt 26 октября 1439 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 24 ноября 1468 г. в местности л'хаy-лес-росесь, л'хаy-лес-росесь, вал-де-марн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 66 лет.

es.23 November 1402–24 November 1468: 23 de noviembre de 1402–24 de noviembre de 1468
es.lifeSummary: Jean de Valois nació el 23 de noviembre de 1402, en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia como hijo de Louis de Valois I, duc d'Orléans, Duke of Orléans y Yolande Mariette D'Enghien. Se casó con Marie d’Harcourt el 26 de octubre de 1439, en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 24 de noviembre de 1468, en L'Haÿ-les-Roses, L'Haÿ-les-Roses, Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 66 años.
